name: gokhanamal-ai-context
description: Open source AI context and installable skills for coding agents

interface.shortDescription: Reusable skills, agents, and workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: A curated open source AI context repo with reusable skills and supporting agent context. Skills can be installed broadly via skills.sh, and the repo also includes first-class packaging for Claude Code and OpenAI Codex.
defaultPrompt: Help me create or debug a GitHub Actions workflow
Capture this reusable fix as a skill, lesson, or solution
Show me the reusable AI context available in this repo
